workflow.name: Implement Story
workflow.critical: Execute ALL steps in exact order — do NOT skip steps
Do NOT stop for "milestones" or "session boundaries" — continue until story COMPLETE or HALT condition
Only modify story file in: Tasks/Subtasks checkboxes, Dev Agent Record, File List, Change Log, Status
NEVER implement anything not mapped to a specific task/subtask in the story file
NEVER mark a task [x] unless ALL validation gates pass — no lying

step.goal: Find next story and load context

check.action: Use story_path directly
Read FULL sprint-status.yaml
Find FIRST story with status "ready-for-dev" (pattern: N-N-name, NOT epic-X)

check.output: Aucune story ready-for-dev. Lance /story pour en creer une ou /pm pour voir le dashboard.
check.action: HALT

step.action: Parse: Story, ACs, Tasks/Subtasks, Dev Notes, Dev Agent Record, File List, Change Log, Status
Extract developer guidance from Dev Notes
Load learnings.xml — apply antipatterns as constraints throughout implementation

check.if: 'Senior Developer Review (AI)' section exists in story
check.action: Count unchecked [AI-Review] tasks in Review Follow-ups section
check.output: Resume apres code review — {{unchecked_count}} items restants. Priorite aux review follow-ups.

step.action: Update story status: ready-for-dev → in-progress (or keep in-progress if resuming)

step.critical: FOLLOW STORY TASKS/SUBTASKS SEQUENCE EXACTLY — NO DEVIATION
step.action: Review current task/subtask from story file

check.if: task has .pen node references or visual ACs
check.action: Verify .pen file exists at referenced path — if not, search for *.pen files
Pencil MCP: batch_get to read .pen nodes
Pencil MCP: get_screenshot for design visual reference
Pencil MCP: snapshot_layout for exact measurements (spacing, sizes, colors)
Store extracted specs: colors (hex → semantic tokens), spacing (px), typography, border-radius, shadows
HALT: "Cannot extract design specs — verify .pen node IDs"

step.action: Write FAILING tests for task functionality
Implement MINIMAL code to make tests pass

For EVERY modified source file: check if *.test.* exists. If yes, run those tests NOW. If broken (missing mocks, changed interfaces), fix IMMEDIATELY. Common: adding hook to component → tests need vi.mock() for that hook. Search ALL test files that import the modified component — not just the direct test file.

check.if: any .tsx file modified in this task
check.critical: MANDATORY — code reading alone CANNOT catch runtime rendering issues
check.action: Playwright MCP: browser_navigate to affected page(s)
Playwright MCP: browser_take_screenshot
Compare screenshot vs .pen design — document 5+ specific comparisons in Dev Agent Record (widths, font-sizes, gaps, colors, border-radius). No vague "match confirmed".
Verify: semantic tokens (no hardcoded text-{color}-{shade}), spacing, typography, layout
Verify REAL DATA renders — not empty states, broken images, stuck loaders, missing sections
Verify ALL UI text is in French
Fix code → new screenshot → repeat until match
HALT: "Cannot validate runtime — verify dev server is running"

step.action: Improve code structure while keeping tests green
Document approach in Dev Agent Record → Implementation Plan
Verify ALL tests for this task EXIST and PASS 100%
Verify implementation matches EXACTLY what the task specifies
Run full test suite — no regressions

check.action: Verify Playwright screenshot taken for every affected page
Verify 5+ measurement comparisons documented
Verify all colors use semantic tokens
Verify all UI text in French
Verify no broken images, missing sections, stuck loaders
DO NOT mark complete — run step 3 runtime validation first
Mark checkbox [x] in Review Follow-ups AND matching Action Item in review section
Log in Dev Agent Record: "Resolved review finding [severity]: description"
Mark task [x] in story
Update File List with ALL new/modified/deleted files (include .test.* and index.ts!)
Add completion notes to Dev Agent Record
DO NOT mark complete — fix first or HALT
GOTO step 3 (next task)
GOTO step 5 (completion)

step.action: Verify File List includes every changed file

Validate DoD: - All tasks/subtasks [x] - All ACs implemented - Unit tests + integration tests added/updated - All tests pass (0 regressions) - Visual validation completed (Playwright screenshots, 5+ comparisons documented) — if frontend - No hardcoded colors where semantic tokens should be used — if frontend - All UI text in French — if frontend - File List complete (paths relative to repo root) - Dev Agent Record has implementation notes - Change Log has summary
